calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent Randall Scott, owner of Certapro Painters, is present.
Michael J. Hughes, Esq. is appearing on behalf of Appellant 4096-17th Street Homeowners Association.
Karen Katz, General Manager for the Homeowners Association, is appearing as witness for the Appellant.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Respondent Scott and counsel Hughes brief the court as to the events and factual issues of the case. The court reviews the exhibits from the previous hearing and questions both sides regarding them. The court questions witness Katz as to the contract and events pertaining to this matter.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the court takes this matter under submission.

JUDGMENT ENTERED.
